pages.full_text:
delicious local produce on the way back to the van – Trasimeno beans, cheese & wine.
We only got back at 7.45. The lights are dim. The water heater doesn't work. Something may be wrong with the second battery.
__Saturday__
Simon has fiddled with the engine – a screw was loose so the second battery was not recharging. Hooray. We will now have running hot water again. It would have been hard if the water tank had failed.
~~On to Angela Aynesbury.~~
When we arrived the wind made the lake noisy & I found it un-soothing, unlike the sea, but later the lake was completely calm. It keeps changing colour. The roads are awful. On motorway lorries often drove with one set of wheels on the emergency lane, to avoid the bumps.
We visited Angela Amesbury & Munro Jack in their lovely house nearby in the hills. Their nearest shop is in
pages.notes: Page continues from previous spread. 'On to Angela Aynesbury' is struck through (crossed out). 'Angela Amesbury' appears later in the text — the struck-through name may be a spelling correction. The lake referred to is Lake Trasimeno. Year cannot be confirmed from this page alone; euro symbol on facing ticket implies post-2002.

pages.full_text: They bought the house & made a large sitting room/kitchen with log burning stove. Upstairs is a double room & twin room & shower room. Downstairs, completely separate, is another bedroom, shower & tiny kitchen. Sitting out in the garden, south facing terrace, wd have been nice, but it was cold & rainy so we gave them coffee in the van. Then we went up to the carpark by the shop & had lunch.
photo_captions: MUSEO DIOCESANO CORTONA (Arezzo) – Biglietto d'ingresso €5 – Beato Angelico Annunciazione (particolare)
pages.notes: Glued-in museum entrance ticket: 'MUSEO DIOCESANO CORTONA (Arezzo)', ticket No. 241682, Biglietto d'ingresso €5, with image captioned 'Beato Angelico  Annunciazione (particolare)'. The €5 ticket and euro symbol confirm post-2002. Place mentions Cortona and Arezzo are from the ticket. Handwritten page number 106 visible top right.
